name: Vegetable Bajji
recipeIngredient: 1 raw green plantain (peeled), cut into thin slices
1 cup Bengal gram flour (besan, chickpea flour)
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the batter, sift the Bengal gram flour, red chili powder, ground coriander, rice flour, and salt into a large mixing bowl. Add the cumin seeds and ghee. Combine well.
2. Gradually add water until the mixture is thick enough for pouring.
3. Peel and prepare the vegetables as needed. Wash and dry the vegetable slices.
4. Heat oil in a heavy frying pan or skillet.
5. Dip each vegetable slice into the batter, ensuring it's fully coated.
6. Carefully place the battered vegetable slices into the hot oil and fry until golden brown.
7. Remove the bajjis from the oil using tongs or a slotted spoon and drain on a paper towel-lined plate.
8. Serve hot with chutney or tomato ketchup.
Makes 15 - 20 bajjis.
